info.name: COMP3161 Course Management API
info.description: Full test suite for the COMP3161 Course Management System. Set the `base_url` variable to your local server or Render URL. Tokens are captured automatically after login — run Auth > Login Admin, Login Lecturer, and Login Student before protected requests.

formdata.value: Completed all endpoints and tested with Postman.

item.name: Student Cannot View Other Student Courses (expect 403)
Lecturer Cannot View Other Lecturer Courses (expect 403)
